what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment att-b0b083c2 in the dragnet-development channel to board item item-c90c0021, recording only an id, attachment type, target URI, and creation timestamp.
observations: The file consists solely of YAML frontmatter between --- delimiters, with no body content
target is expressed as a board://item-c90c0021 URI
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset
No code symbols or explanatory prose are present
standouts: The attachment target uses a board:// URI scheme to point at a board item
The file is a minimal metadata stub with no payload body
It ties a channel attachment to a specific board item rather than to a message or thread
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with standard ledger fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
Represents cross-item references with a URI-style identifier
Stores attachments as markdown files in a channel-memory directory
concerns: The file contains no body or description, so the semantic purpose of the attachment is not self-contained
The referenced board item is identified but not explained within this file
notes: A bare metadata stub that records a dragnet-development channel attachment pointing to board item item-c90c0021.
questions: What content or note does this attachment carry beyond the metadata?
What is the nature or state of board://item-c90c0021?
Why is there no body text or context for the attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: The file does not declare an explicit purpose beyond its fields; it actually functions as a timestamped attachment-to-board-item reference.
intention_signals: It appears designed to create a durable, discoverable link between a channel attachment and a specific board item so the attachment can be located in the board item's context.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item from a channel attachment metadata file.
contribution: It contributes a concrete attachment-to-board-item association (att-b0b083c2 -> board://item-c90c0021) in the dragnet-development channel, including a creation timestamp, which supports traceability from attachments to board items.
summary_for_embedding: A dragnet-development channel attachment metadata file of type board_items that references board item item-c90c0021 and records an added ISO timestamp, with no body content.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a link from a channel attachment to a board item so the attachment can be retrieved in that item's context.
